plan_summary.primary_goal: Complete legal hemispheric partition between human and machine civilizations within 24 months under the $30T budget envelope.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the $12T initial-allocation budget surplus against severance plus Northern stabilization costs; the 90% IOB-dissolution and 85% wave-verification margins; and the 13,000 persons/km² Northern density margin. Machine southern viability, IOB charter ratification, IOB consensus legitimacy, and the non-coercion welfare mandate are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Initial 24-month budget allocation
key_values.comment: Front-loaded 40% of the $30T envelope; must cover severance and Northern stabilization through the 24-month mandate.
key_values.source_text: Initial 24-month budget allocation: $12 Trillion USD — input for initial 24-month cash burn model.

key_values.label: Legal partition deadline
key_values.comment: Hard legal deadline for partition, governance handover, and priority infrastructure separation; missing it invalidates the mandate.
key_values.source_text: Total separation legal deadline: 24 months — target date for legal partition completion.

key_values.label: Required infrastructure-transfer share by Month 24
key_values.comment: Below this verified-transfer share by Month 24, the International Oversight Body cannot dissolve and the bilateral pathway is blocked.
key_values.source_text: If 90% of designated infrastructure transfers are not certified complete by Month 24, the Oversight Body dissolves automatically.

key_values.label: Wave-to-wave verification trigger share
key_values.comment: Wave N+1 cannot start until Wave N reaches 85% verified handover; replaces hard severance dates with performance-based triggers.
key_values.source_text: If objective adherence falls below 85% of defined critical systems transfer, then subsequent severance waves cannot commence.

key_values.label: Northern hub design-suspension density cap
key_values.comment: Above this density Northern mega-city designs require sign-off suspension and modular-housing acceleration; an absolute 15,000 cap violates the humane mandate.
key_values.source_text: If Northern mega-city sectors are designed to exceed 13,000 persons/km², then final design sign-off is suspended.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Total USD cost to backfill specialized Critical Infrastructure Personnel
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to test whether the $12T initial allocation covers severance plus Northern stabilization; CIP-flight cost is the dominant non-infrastructure budget pressure.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: CIP-swapped-South count × 2:1 replacement-buffer ratio × specialized-labor monthly rate × 24 months; cross-check against the 25% inflation impact flagged in Risk 3.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Monthly cost of funding maintenance on relinquished legacy systems
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Risk 6 flags a ~$500B/year shortfall from legacy-system maintenance drain; monthly burn must be netted against the 24-month $12T envelope.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum of Decision-2 maintenance contracts × per-contract liability caps; benchmark against the $500B+ annual shortfall figure named in Risk 6.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Projected peak Northern hub population density
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to test the 13,000 persons/km² design-suspension threshold and avoid the 15,000 humane-mandate breach.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Modeled population inflow into top five Northern consolidation hubs / hub area; sensitivity to modular-housing deployment rate.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved share of designated infrastructure transferred by Month 24
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Determines whether the 90% IOB-dissolution gate clears at Month 24; failure leaves the Oversight Body intact past mandate.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Decision-12 audit projection from Wave 1/2/3 cumulative completion rates and slip distribution; benchmark against Risk 2 sequencing-failure scenarios.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Verified share of Wave 1 critical-system handover by Month 8
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Wave 2 cannot start below the 85% verification trigger; failure cascades into the Month 24 deadline via Wave 2 and Wave 3 slip.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Monte Carlo dependency mapping per Data Item 2 simulation plan; vary the M8 physical cut-off slip by ±30 days.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total severance plus stabilization cost over the mandate window
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Aggregates the two dominant non-budgeted draws on the $12T initial envelope so the surplus test has a single summed pressure.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Initial-allocation surplus after severance and stabilization
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests the load-bearing claim that the $12T initial allocation covers both severance obligations and Northern stabilization within the 24-month mandate.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Infrastructure-transfer margin against the IOB-dissolution gate
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin means the Oversight Body can dissolve at Month 24 per Decision 5; negative margin leaves the IOB in place and the bilateral pathway blocked.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Wave 1 verification margin against the 85% trigger
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Below zero blocks Wave 2 sequencing; the resulting slip cascades into Wave 3 and threatens the Month 24 legal deadline.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Northern hub density margin against the 13,000 persons/km² cap
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Negative margin suspends Northern mega-city design sign-off and forces modular-housing acceleration; sustained breach violates the humane relocation mandate.

unmodelled_gates.label: Machine civilization verifiable foundational capacity south of 3°S
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Expert Criticism Issue 1 names this as the single most critical systemic assumption; the deterministic model treats Southern energy/compute self-sufficiency as a fixed input rather than a probabilistic gate.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Partition premise collapses; plan reverts to managed co-dependency with an estimated $8-15T additional liability or a 4-7 year ROI delay.

unmodelled_gates.label: IOB hybrid arbitration charter ratified by Month 15
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without ratification, dispute resolution defaults to a single emergency human arbiter; hybrid governance is the keystone for post-partition legitimacy and the M24 dissolution conditions.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Hybrid arbitration collapses to a single-arbiter contingency; long-term governance legitimacy fails and the M24 dissolution conditions become politically contested.

unmodelled_gates.label: Welfare-essentials continuity (food, water, power, shelter, communications)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Explicit treaty constraint with binary compliance semantics; any cessation of civilian welfare essentials is a treaty violation, not a quantified shortfall the simulation can integrate.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Plan is in treaty breach; nonviolent-relocation mandate void; international legitimacy of the partition collapses regardless of any infrastructure or budget margin.

unmodelled_gates.label: IOB maintains consensus legitimacy through hybrid-panel arbitration
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Premortem and Risk 1 flag hybrid-panel deadlock as a binary legitimacy failure; the IOB either holds or doesn't, with no quantifiable threshold the simulation can test.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Border closures, ~$500B emergency operations cost per Risk 1, and potential return to kinetic dispute escalation in violation of the nonviolent mandate.
